<!-- ABOUT -->
<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%">

### `> whoami`

```js
const anakin = {
  name: "Paul RUIZ",
  alias: "LooperSalty",
  location: "France 🇫🇷",
  role: "Vibe Coder & World Builder",
  
  currentlyBuilding: [
    "🎮 Minecraft clone → C++17/OpenGL",
    "🏴‍☠️ Roblox games → Battle Royale, Naval Combat",
    "🤖 AI Multi-Agent Systems → Claude + Gemini",
    "🌍 Procedural Worlds → Three.js + AI",
  ],
  
  philosophy: "Le code est un art — ship fast, vibe hard",
  funFact: "Mon IA monte mes vidéos YouTube 🎬",
};
```

</td>
<td width="50%">

### `> skills --level max`

```yaml
Mastered:
  ├── 🦀 Rust        ████████████ 95%
  ├── ⚡ TypeScript   ████████████ 93%
  ├── 🔷 C++         ███████████░ 90%
  ├── 🐍 Python      ███████████░ 88%
  ├── 🎮 Luau        ███████████░ 88%
  └── 🤖 AI/ML       ██████████░░ 85%

Superpower:
  └── 🔮 Vibe Coding ████████████ 100%
      "I don't write code.
       I describe worlds,
       and they compile."
```

</td>
</tr>
</table>

<div align="center">

### ⚔️ Projets Épiques

</div>

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">🏗️ Minecraft Clone</h3>
<p align="center">
  <a href="https://github.com/LooperSalty/Minecraft">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/C++17-OpenGL_3.3-004E98?style=for-the-badge&logo=cplusplus&logoColor=white" />
  </a>
</p>
<p align="center">Clone Minecraft 1.8.9 from scratch — pixel rendering, terrain generation, physics engine, chunk loading</p>

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">🌍 NexaGen</h3>
<p align="center">
  <a href="https://github.com/LooperSalty/nexagen">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-Three.js_+_AI-FF6B35?style=for-the-badge&logo=threedotjs&logoColor=white" />
  </a>
</p>
<p align="center">AI-Powered Procedural World Engine — génération de mondes infinis jouables dans le navigateur</p>

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">🎭 Claude Orchestra</h3>
<p align="center">
  <a href="https://github.com/LooperSalty/claude-orchestra">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-Tauri_Desktop-FFD23F?style=for-the-badge&logo=tauri&logoColor=white" />
  </a>
</p>
<p align="center">Orchestration multi-agents IA — interface desktop pour piloter Claude & Gemini en parallèle</p>

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">🦀 Claw Code</h3>
<p align="center">
  <a href="https://github.com/LooperSalty/claw-code">
    <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Rust-Harness_Tools-00F5A0?style=for-the-badge&logo=rust&logoColor=white" />
  </a>
</p>
<p align="center">Harness tools haute performance pour agents IA — le repo le plus rapide à 50K stars dans l'histoire</p>

</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">⚔️ CRUMBLE</h3>
<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Luau-Roblox_Battle_Royale-004E98?style=for-the-badge&logo=robloxstudio&logoColor=white" />
</p>
<p align="center">Battle Royale Roblox — 7 modes, 6 armes, 4 plateformes, 50 joueurs simultanés</p>

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

<h3 align="center">🏴‍☠️ Sea of Plunder</h3>

</p>

</td>
</tr>
